title: pimpinella tragium subsp. depressa
intro: Pimpinella tragium subsp. depressa, commonly known as Black Lovage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Black Lovage include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as soothing digestive issues such as cramps and diarrhea. Black Lovage can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
